quotedUser.name: Patrick Witt
quotedUser.text: The deceit here is that it is not the paying of yield on a balance per se that necessitates bank-like regulations, but rather the lending out or rehypothecation of the dollars that make up the underlying balance. The GENIUS Act explicitly forbids stablecoin issuers from doing the latter. Stablecoins...

title: Step one was access. Step two is utility.
snippet: Ondo Finance (@OndoFinance): Step one was access. Step two is utility. Tokenized stocks are no longer just exposure to traditional markets. They're becoming collateral, building blocks, and productive capital in the onchain economy.

quotedUser.name: Morpho 🦋
quotedUser.text:
Morpho helps @ondofinance turn tokenized stocks productive.

Until now, tokenized stocks offered only exposure. Morpho helps by making them usable as collateral, unlocking new liquidity and strategies.

Ondo tokenized stocks can do more, with composability seen only onchain.
